title: stelis schnitteri
intro: Stelis schnitteri, also known as the orchid of the forest, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Stelis schnitteri include reducing inflammation and improving the overall respiratory function, making it a valuable resource for people suffering from respiratory diseases. Herbal preparations of Stelis schnitteri often involve making infusions or decoctions from its flowers, leaves, or roots, which can be consumed as teas or used topically to treat various health conditions.
